# Windfola ◆

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

*Mount.*

---

Attach to a (Spirit) hero, or to Éowyn. Restricted.
Attached character gets +1 WP.
**Response:** After attached character is removed from the quest, exhaust Windfola to commit that character to the quest.

> *...the great grey steed Windfola made little of the burden; for Dernhelm was less in weight than many men, though lithe and well-knit in frame.*
